description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and large glass windows, surrounded by a walled yard. The property features a spacious outdoor area with a swimming pool, patio seating, and landscaped greenery, including palm trees and shrubs. The house is set back from the street, with a driveway and a gated entrance leading to the main building. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The rear of the property includes additional outdoor amenities, such as a hot tub and a shaded lounge area. The overall design emphasizes open space, outdoor living, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, a swimming pool, and landscaped outdoor spaces, enclosed by a perimeter wall. The design features clean lines, light colors, and a focus on open, airy living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entrance, driveway, and main facade with large windows and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the property, the pool area, and the rear garden with additional seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, pool, hot tub, and shaded lounge area, with the house's flat roof and glass features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full extent of the yard, pool, and the house's modern, linear architecture.
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with a driveway, modern door, minimal steps, and landscaped approach
